LightningComponentBundle.description: Dynamic FieldSet-driven datatable for displaying usage data (Transaction Journals, Usage Summaries, Liable Summaries) on Account and Asset record pages. Columns, sorting, and pagination are fully configurable via FieldSet metadata.

property.name: usageObject
property.label: Usage Object
property.description: The usage SObject to display. Each object must have a matching FieldSet deployed.

property.name: fieldSetName
property.label: Field Set Name
property.description: Developer name of the FieldSet that defines which columns to display. Defaults to RLM_UsageDatatable.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Optional title for the card header. If left blank, defaults to the Usage Object API name.
